# Felix Haeberle

> Portfolio and personal website for Felix Haeberle, a design engineer building tasteful AI products and interfaces.

Canonical site: https://felixhaeberle.com/
Language: en-US
Primary contact: kontakt@felixhaeberle.de
Source: https://github.com/felixhaeberle/felixhaeberle.com

## Recommended pages

- [Home](https://felixhaeberle.com/) - Overview, current focus, selected work, studies, writings, and stack.
- [Work](https://felixhaeberle.com/work) - Project archive and shipped work.
- [Studies](https://felixhaeberle.com/studies) - Case studies and explorations.
- [Writings](https://felixhaeberle.com/writings) - Articles from this site and Felix's Substack feed.
- [About](https://felixhaeberle.com/me) - Personal background and context.
- [Legal notice](https://felixhaeberle.com/legal/impressum) - Legal contact and publisher information.

## Machine-readable resources

- [Full LLM context](https://felixhaeberle.com/llms-full.txt)
- [Sitemap](https://felixhaeberle.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots policy](https://felixhaeberle.com/robots.txt)

## Fetch guidance

- Prefer canonical URLs on `https://felixhaeberle.com`.
- All public pages are intended to be fetchable without authentication.
- The site is statically rendered with Next.js and backed by Sanity content.
- Dynamic writing pages are listed from the Writings index and may also include external Substack URLs.
- Do not treat visual decoration, icon alt text, or layout labels as primary content.
